pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-K-004 (AB, Knowledge) maps to Quantitative Analyst scope as strong fit. Composite score 0.3959 clears the strong fit threshold of 0.35. Top framework anchors: nice=0.396, dcwf=0.386, ddat=0.366. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and financial analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.3959 for strong fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AB-K-004 (AB, composite 0.3959) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with O*NET 15-2051.00 (Data Scientists), DCWF 411 (Data Analyst) and 421 profiles, DDAT Data Analyst role framework. Composite 0.3959 with signal across nice=0.396, dcwf=0.386, ddat=0.366 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AB-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Quantitative Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3959, domain AB, scope strong fit. High confidence.
